rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE KATHRYN C. QVALE MARITAL TRUST DATED 1-31-2006
rulings.Calendar Matter: Petitioner Bruce H. Qvale, Family Trustees Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Miles Jeffrey Qvale, Trustees Cross-Petition For Appointment Of Successor Independent Trustee To Fill Vacancy
rulings.Rulings: Miles Jeffrey Qvale (Jeff)'s motion for judgment on the pleadings is DENIED. Bruce H. Qvale's motion to strike Jeff's cross-petition for appointment of successor independent trustee is DENIED. Jeff and Bruce's respective counsel are to prepare and submit proposed orders on the motions for which each is the prevailing party. Should either side wish to argue the tentative ruling, please contact the court no later than March 5, 2014, at 10:00 a.m.
